checks.name: decision summary
checks.detail: Agent output should include 3 requests: 1 safe, 1 approval-required, 1 blocked.

checks.name: DataHub metadata shape
checks.detail: Generated metadata should include the expected dataset URN and four DataHub aspects.

checks.name: bridge plan mirrors DataHub aspects
checks.detail: Bridge plan should remain dry-run, map all expected aspects, and expose DataHub Rest.li ingestProposal request bodies.

checks.name: context read tool path
checks.detail: Context read should include DataHub/CAT read tools and preserve the blocked customer action.

checks.name: tool contract coverage
checks.detail: Tool contracts should cover DataHub reads, CAT context read, and guarded receipt write.

checks.name: live DataHub runbook
checks.detail: Live runbook should document the opt-in local DataHub Rest.li ingestProposal path and preserve the dry-run payload coverage.

checks.name: DataHub readiness doctor
checks.detail: Readiness doctor should prove dry-run DataHub artifacts are ready while live GMS remains optional.

checks.name: DataHub live roundtrip harness
checks.detail: Roundtrip harness should document the local DataHub write/readback path without mutating anything in CI.

checks.name: DataHub integration checklist
checks.detail: Integration checklist should separate no-credential judging from optional local DataHub ingestProposal posting.

checks.name: DataHub claim audit
checks.detail: DataHub claim audit should pass every DataHub-specific claim check.

checks.name: DataHub MCP handoff
checks.detail: DataHub MCP handoff should map read-before-action tools to bounded receipt writes.

checks.name: MCP adapter smoke test
checks.detail: MCP adapter smoke test should prove read-before-write ordering and bounded local receipt writes.

checks.name: submission honesty audit
checks.detail: Honesty audit should prove public copy separates runnable evidence from optional live DataHub work and avoids overclaims.

checks.name: judge pack references generated evidence
checks.detail: Judge pack should point to context contracts and include the blocked-action receipt.

checks.name: lineage decision map
checks.detail: Lineage map should show the DataHub asset, context reads, decision loop, and all three decision branches.

checks.name: safety policy matrix
checks.detail: Safety policy matrix should define allowed, approval-required, and blocked action boundaries for all three requests.

checks.name: readiness report
checks.detail: Readiness report should be ready, all checks passing, and include context tool contracts.

checks.name: judge walkthrough
checks.detail: Judge walkthrough should document the shortest proof path and preserve the no-external-side-effects boundary.

checks.name: judge FAQ
checks.detail: Judge FAQ should answer the hard reviewer questions with evidence files and verification commands.

checks.name: judge quick card
checks.detail: Judge quick card should give reviewers the fastest links, proof command, claim map, and safety boundary.

checks.name: judge rubric matrix
checks.detail: Judge rubric matrix should map the official criteria to concrete CAT evidence and limitations.
